changes: Add biome discovery modal with banner images that appears when discovering new biomes
Add depth filter to dependency graph focus mode—limit traversal to 1-10 steps from a focused node to see just the next few unlocks without the full tree
Add new 'Comb Rock Pools' action for Rocky Shore that gives 35% chance for crabs and 15% chance for fish
Add new 'Rock Pool Cache' building that provides +3 storage for fish, crabs, and shells
Apply all Fishing skill milestones to both Wade Tidal Pool and Comb Rock Pools actions
Fix expedition progress bar to show only undiscovered biomes for the current expedition instead of all undiscovered biomes globally
Fix mobile modal display issue where taps during animation could dismiss modals before they become visible
Fix modal rendering layering issues on Chrome Android by rendering modals inline instead of in a separate portal
Improve Spear Fishing: now has 15% chance to catch large fish and 15% chance to catch crabs, plus 10% faster action speed at Fishing level 8
Remove building toast notifications — settlement panel already displays new buildings clearly
Replace small text toast notifications with full-screen modal showing biome name, banner image, and discovery flavor text
Add collapsible stash section to resource panel for organizing items when inventory exceeds 15 items
Add encouraging messages when discovering the Bamboo Grove and building the Camp Fire
Add grid view toggle to inventory panel for compact icon-only display
Improve early game food production pacing with stronger early fishing bonuses
Increase Fishing Level 2 milestone: now grants +5% crab chance (previously +2% fish and crab)
Increase Fishing Level 3 milestone: now grants +10% fish chance (previously +2% fish and crab)
Move tools section below items in inventory (tools don't change often)
Save inventory view preference (list/grid) to local storage
Show building discovery notifications in toast alerts alongside biome discoveries
Add item source information in inventory (shows which actions, recipes, stations, or expeditions produce each resource)
Fix bug where crop stations could exceed plot limits by counting each crop type separately instead of sharing plot slots
Make inventory items tap-to-expand to show detailed information
Replace small biome icons with panoramic banner headers in the gather tab for a more immersive visual experience
Show tool prerequisites on locked actions and recipes instead of hiding them completely
